message.content:
Review PR #348 for bugs based on git history and blame.

Use `gh pr view 348 --json files` to get modified files, then use `git log` and `git blame` on those files to understand historical context.

Look for:
- Patterns that previous commits established that this PR violates
- Previous bug fixes that this PR might reintroduce
- Historical decisions documented in commit messages
- Patterns in how similar code was modified before

Return list of issues found with:
- File and line number
- Description
- Historical context (cite commit sha/message)
- Why it's relevant

Only report significant issues, not minor style differences.

content.text: I'll review PR #348 by examining the modified files and their git history to identify potential issues.

input.description: Get PR #348 details including modified files

{"body":"### Ticket 🐗

[RECO-340](https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-340)

### Changes 🍍

- add curated products (ids)
- add endpoint
- add logic to sort products
- add caching
- tests

### PR Checks 🐊

- [x] I've self-reviewed my code.
- [x] I've added the necessary labels.
- [x] I've added tests for my code.
- [ ] I've updated the documentation.
